commit.subject: LU-19441 build: prefer snprintf over strncpy
commit.message:
LU-19441 build: prefer snprintf over strncpy

error: '__builtin_strncpy' offset 0 is out of the bounds [0, 0] \
[-Werror=array-bounds]

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: b8f79d83cb7 ("LU-19327 obdclass: fix obd_uuid2str()")
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ic3702c40e71e7b0c9b9ce30b158acbadab1ded6b
